Spring Data Redis

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord

Packages that use ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.

  • Uses of ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord in org.springframework.data.redis.connection

    Description

    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord.approximateTrimming(boolean approximateTrimming)
    Apply efficient trimming for capped streams using the ~ flag.

    Disable creation of stream if it does not already exist.
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord

    Disable creation of stream if it does not already exist.
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord.maxlen(long maxlen)
    Limit the size of the stream to the given maximum number of elements.
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord.minId(RecordId minId)
    Apply MINID trimming strategy, that evicts entries with IDs lower than the one specified.
    static ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord.of(ByteBufferRecord record)
    Creates a new ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord given body.

    Applies the Geo set key.
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord
    ReactiveStreamCommands.AddStreamRecord.withOptions(RedisStreamCommands.XAddOptions options)
    Apply the given RedisStreamCommands.XAddOptions to configure the XADD command.
